ddls:
CREATE TABLE "dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dependency */,
  "installed_version" TEXT /* Version of the dependency installed in the project */,
  "remote_version" TEXT /* Latest version of the dependency available remotely */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the dependency repository or source */,
  "license_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the license type */,
  "license_period_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the license period */,
  "material_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the material status */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department using the dependency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dependency */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the dependency was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the dependency was last updated */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author of the dependency */,
  "related_to" TEXT /* Related project or component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_license_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("license_period_id") REFERENCES license_periods ("license_period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_material_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_status_id") REFERENCES material_status ("material_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_license_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("license_type_id") REFERENCES license_types ("license_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "github_username" TEXT /* GitHub username of the author */,
  "website" TEXT /* Author's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department manager */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the department was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the department was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the project belongs to */,
  "lead_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project lead */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependency_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependency being used */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project using the dependency */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the dependency was used */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of usage (e.g., installation, update, removal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the usage event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependency_usage_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependency_usage_dependency_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependency_id") REFERENCES dependencies ("dependency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "license_types" (
  "license_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the license type (e.g., MIT, Apache, GPL) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the license type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the license type was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the license type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "license_periods" (
  "license_period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license period */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the license period (e.g., perpetual, 1 year) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the license period */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the license period was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the license period was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_status" (
  "material_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material status */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the material status (e.g., material, not material) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material status */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the material status was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the material status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, project manager, admin) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependency being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dependency */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dependency was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, update) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dependency_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependency_id") REFERENCES dependencies ("dependency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependency_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependency */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the dependency */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog for the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependency_versions_dependency_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependency_id") REFERENCES dependencies ("dependency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., developer, project manager, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_assignments" (
  "role_assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependency_conflicts" (
  "conflict_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conflict */,
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependency */,
  "conflicting_dependency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conflicting dependency */,
  "conflict_type" TEXT /* Type of conflict (e.g., version conflict, license conflict) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the conflict was detected */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the conflict was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conflict_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependency_conflicts_conflicting_dependency_id FOREIGN KEY ("conflicting_dependency_id") REFERENCES dependencies ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependency_conflicts_dependency_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependency_id") REFERENCES dependencies ("dependency_id")
)
